mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_tbl_member_security.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_member_security ( member_no, memberid, passwd, enabled, name, birthday, email, mobile, postcode, address, detail_address, extra_address, point, point_earned_total, registerday, passwd_modify_date, last_login_date, grade_code, member_type, lookup_key ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{memberid}, #{passwd}, '1', #{name}, #{birthday}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{detail_address}, #{extra_address}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, default, 'MEMBER', #{lookupKey} )

SELECT seq_tbl_member_security.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_member_security ( member_no, memberid, passwd, enabled, name, email, point, point_earned_total, registerday, passwd_modify_date, last_login_date, grade_code, member_type, social_provider, provider_user_id ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{memberid}, #{passwd}, '1', #{name}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, default, 'MEMBER', #{socialProvider}, #{providerUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT member_no AS memberNo, name, mobile, enabled, member_type AS memberType, lookup_key AS lookupKey FROM tbl_member_security WHERE lookup_key = #{lookupKey}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_tbl_member_security.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_member_security ( member_no, enabled, name, mobile, registerday, passwd_modify_date, last_login_date, member_type, lookup_key, grade_code ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, '1', #{name}, #{mobile}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 'GUEST', #{lookupKey}, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT member_no AS memberNo, memberid, passwd, enabled, name, birthday, email, mobile, postcode, address, detail_address, extra_address, point, point_earned_total, grade_code, registerday, passwd_modify_date, last_login_date, member_type AS memberType, lookup_key AS lookupKey, social_provider AS socialProvider, provider_user_id AS providerUserId FROM tbl_member_security WHERE social_provider = #{socialProvider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}

SELECT member_no AS memberNo, memberid, passwd, enabled, name, birthday, email, mobile, postcode, address, detail_address, extra_address, point, point_earned_total, grade_code, registerday, passwd_modify_date, last_login_date, member_type AS memberType, lookup_key AS lookupKey, social_provider AS socialProvider, provider_user_id AS providerUserId FROM tbl_member_security WHERE member_no = #{memberNo}

SELECT member_no AS memberNo, memberid, passwd, enabled, name, birthday, email, mobile, postcode, address, detail_address, extra_address, point, point_earned_total, registerday, passwd_modify_date, last_login_date, grade_code, member_type AS memberType, lookup_key AS lookupKey, social_provider AS socialProvider, provider_user_id AS providerUserId FROM tbl_member_security WHERE memberid = #{memberid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_loginhistory(historyno, member_no, logindate, clientip) VALUES(seq_historyno.nextval, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE, #{clientip})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member_security SET passwd = #{passwd}, passwd_modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberid}
